name: Naivedya Thali Restaurant
description: The most authentic Maharashtrian Thali in the city. Unlimited servings of traditional dishes – a cultural experience on a plate.

name: Masala Dosa House
description: Famous for crispy masala dosas, idli, vada, and filter coffee. Authentic South Indian flavors.

name: The Grill Room
description: Indulge in rich Mughlai preparations, kebabs, biryanis, and North Indian curries in a royal ambiance.

name: Chaat Street Corner
description: Vibrant street food stall serving the best Pani Puri, Bhel, Dahi Puri, and Sev Puri in town.

name: Renaissance Dine
description: Fine dining with a wide variety of global and local cuisines. Premium experience with garden view seating.
